flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Cabrillo College fell 35% between 2009 and 2010 (10.3% → 6.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cabrillo College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cabrillo College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $9.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cabrillo College rose 115% between 2007 and 2010 (6.4k → 13.7k).
